prose: The frontier orbitals (specifically, the HOMO–LUMO gap) of aniline were calculated using DFT at the B3LYP functional with the def2-TZVP basis set (tier 'standard') using the PySCF backend, in gas phase, charge 0, and multiplicity 1. The calculation used the provided molecular coordinates in /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/aniline/aniline.xyz and conducted an SCF calculation with full convergence achieved in 9 cycles. HOMO energy is -5.5538 eV, LUMO energy is -0.2490 eV, resulting in a gap of 5.3048 eV. Warnings reported by the tool were: 'common header present' and 'headline field 'homo_lumo_gap_eV' = 5.304817651371539 (present and numeric),' and integrity was confirmed as trustworthy. The exact command run was: '/home/erobles/chem-skills/mcp_server/chemkit_engine/cli.py frontier --method dft --tier standard --charge 0 --mult 1 --solvent none /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/aniline/aniline.xyz --out /home/erobles/chem-skills/.fidelity_scratch/tmpclda2jr5/live.json'.
